goal: Keep state graph CLI usage text aligned with graph reports that support machine-readable JSON output.
tests: rg -n "graph clusters <event-id\\|patch-id\\|eval-id\\|commit> \\[--depth N\\] \\[--json\\]|graph impact <event-id\\|patch-id\\|eval-id\\|commit> \\[--depth N\\] \\[--json\\]|graph signals <event-id\\|patch-id\\|eval-id\\|commit> \\[--depth N\\] \\[--json\\]|graph hotspots \\[--limit N\\] \\[--json\\]" src/commands_state.rs
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Graph reports emit machine-readable JSON, but broad help text silently omits the flag and makes automation support look unsupported or inconsistent.
